post.summary: Add a video to current user watchlist

delete.summary: Remove a video from current user watchlist

200.description: Video removed from watch history successfully

delete.summary: Remove a video from current user watch history

409.description: Channel with this slug already exists

post.summary: Upload a file from URL (Admin only)
Subscribe to a channel (creates subscription if missing)

patch.summary: Update notification settings for a channel subscription

get.summary: Get video details and increment view count
Check if current user has liked the video
Get comments for a video (with nested replies)

post.summary: Add a comment to a video
Reply to a comment (one level nesting only)

get.summary: Check if current user has liked the comment

email.description: Email address to receive verification code

isActive.description: Whether the user account is active

isEmailVerified.description: Whether the email has been verified

total.description: Total number of watch history items

durationSeconds.description: Total duration of the video in seconds
